scripts.db:generate: node scripts/db-ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && prisma generate
scripts.db:push: node scripts/db-ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && prisma db push
scripts.db:reset: node scripts/db-ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && prisma db push --force-reset && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/db-ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:studio: node scripts/db-ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && prisma studio
scripts.db:seed: node scripts/db-ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && tsx --env-file=.env prisma/seed.ts
